title: Facilitating Agricultural Regulatory Modernization Act
purpose: Demo pack for comparing C-273 against the current federal laws it amends.
theme: Agricultural regulatory modernization through trusted-jurisdiction reliance, provisional registration, and foreign regulatory authority deeming orders.

amendedLaws.demoFocus: Adds a trusted jurisdiction definition and creates provisional/final approval or registration for feeds.
Adds a trusted jurisdiction definition and creates provisional/final approval or registration for fertilizers and supplements.
Adds provisional/final seed variety registration and reliance on trusted-jurisdiction evidence.
Adds trusted-jurisdiction reliance and provisional registration for pest control products.
Expands section 30.06 foreign-regulatory-authority deeming orders to include veterinary drugs.
